columnDefinitions.name: Name
columnDefinitions.description: Name must be unique within a namespace. Is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Cannot be updated. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names#names

columnDefinitions.name: Phase
columnDefinitions.description: Backup Storage Location status such as Available/Unavailable

columnDefinitions.name: Last Validated
columnDefinitions.description: LastValidationTime is the last time the backup store location was validated

columnDefinitions.name: Age
columnDefinitions.description: Custom resource definition column (in JSONPath format): .metadata.creationTimestamp
